message:
fix(agentmail): cap overseer response body at 10MB to prevent DoS/OOM

`Client.SendOverseerMessage` previously read the HTTP response body
with an unbounded `io.ReadAll(resp.Body)`. A malicious or broken
overseer endpoint could return a very large (or unbounded streaming)
response and drive the ntm process to OOM or kill the agent.

Wraps the read in `io.LimitReader(resp.Body, 10<<20)` so we stop at
10MB regardless of what the server claims in Content-Length. Ten
megabytes is far beyond any legitimate overseer JSON payload we have
ever seen but is small enough to be safe as a hard ceiling.

No behaviour change for well-behaved endpoints.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
